title: osbertia bartlettii
side_effects: Osbertia bartlettii can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing allergic reactions, irritating the skin and mucous membranes, and causing gastrointestinal issues. Ingesting the plant's leaves or roots can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged exposure to the plant's oils can cause headaches, dizziness, and respiratory problems. Additionally, improper use of Osbertia bartlettii may also exacerbate underlying health conditions, such as asthma or eczema.
